etymology.description: 凱(凱) (kǎi, "triumphant") + 里(里) (lǐ, "neighborhood") form the name of Kaili City in Guizhou, China.
etymology.interpretation: The name 凱(凱) (kǎi, "triumphant") gives a sense of victory or success, often associated with celebration or achievement. 里(里) (lǐ, "neighborhood") pertains to a local area or community. Together, 凱里 suggests a prosperous and thriving locality.

examples.chinese: 凯里市位于中国贵州省(凱里市位於中國貴州省)。
examples.pinyin: Kǎilǐ shì wèiyú Zhōngguó Guìzhōu shěng.
examples.english: Kaili City is located in Guizhou Province, China.

examples.chinese: 我们打算去凯里旅游(我們打算去凱里旅遊)。
examples.english: We plan to travel to Kaili.

examples.chinese: 凯里的苗族文化非常独特(凱里的苗族文化非常獨特)。
examples.pinyin: Kǎilǐ de Miáozú wénhuà fēicháng dútè.
examples.english: The Miao culture in Kaili is very unique.
